features.name: Foundation & Domain Models
features.description: Spatie installs (permission, activitylog, tags), Request/Customer/Category/Mailbox/Note models + enums, permission groups, factories, DemoSeeder, tour doc 01. Spec: docs/ideation/helpstripe/spec-phase-1.md
features.done_when: ./init.sh passes; migrate:fresh --seed builds the documented demo dataset; Foundation tests green; docs/tour/01-foundation.md demo script works
features.evidence: 2026-06-10: ./init.sh → pint passed, phpstan 0 errors, pest 88/88 (577 assertions). php artisan migrate:fresh --seed → 1 team, 4 users, 3 categories, 2 mailboxes, 8 customers, 40 requests (10 unassigned, 4 urgent), 140 notes. php artisan test --compact --filter=Foundation → 28 passed. Tour demo script verified via tinker.

features.name: Ticket Management
features.description: Request queue + detail Livewire UI, assignment, public reply vs private note, activitylog history, saved Filters, canned Responses, domain events + assignment notification. Spec: docs/ideation/helpstripe/spec-phase-2.md
features.done_when: ./init.sh passes; Requests test suites green; docs/tour/02-ticket-management.md demo script runs start-to-finish
features.evidence: 2026-06-10: ./init.sh → pint passed, phpstan 0 errors, pest 145/145 (713 assertions). php artisan test --compact --filter=Requests → 61 passed (Queue 13, ShowRequest 20, Actions 16, Filter 8 + 4 suites). migrate:fresh --seed → 40 requests (20 open), 3 Responses, 2 shared Filters. Review cycle 1 of 3 PASS (0 critical/high; 2 medium fixed in-cycle). Demo script verified: queue filters/saved Filters/reply/private note/assign-notify/resolve/history all covered by tests; notification on database+mail channels.

features.name: Shared Inbox & Email Pipeline
features.description: Resend outbound (threading headers) + inbound webhook (spatie/webhook-client), attachments via medialibrary, mail:replay command, POST /api/v1/requests intake channel. Spec: docs/ideation/helpstripe/spec-phase-3.md
features.done_when: ./init.sh passes; Inbox + Api tests green; mail:replay fixtures create/match requests; live Resend round-trip verified per docs/tour/03-shared-inbox.md
features.evidence: 2026-06-10: ./init.sh → pint passed, phpstan 0 errors, pest 228/228 (923 assertions). php artisan test --compact --filter=Inbox → 27 passed (Webhook 6, Matching 8, Outbound 6, Replay 4, Attachment 3). --filter=CreateRequestApiTest → 7 passed. mail:replay all three fixtures create/thread requests offline (Http::fake'd). Review cycle 2 of 3 PASS (cycle 1 found 1 high/testing: attachment size-cap skip had no coverage → added InboundAttachmentTest; 1 medium/logic: controller null-team deref → abort_unless 503 guard). Live Resend round-trip: code path complete; requires one-time external setup (domain+MX+webhook secret) documented in docs/tour/03-shared-inbox.md §9B — not executed in this session.

features.name: Self-Service Portal
features.description: Public portal layout, submit form, confirmation email with access key, email+key status lookup, customer replies. Spec: docs/ideation/helpstripe/spec-phase-4.md
features.done_when: ./init.sh passes; Portal tests green (incl. no private-note leak); docs/tour/04-portal.md demo script works

features.name: Knowledge Base
features.description: Knowledge Books → Chapters → Pages with sluggable URLs, drafts, admin manager, portal browsing + LIKE search. Spec: docs/ideation/helpstripe/spec-phase-5.md
features.done_when: ./init.sh passes; KnowledgeBase tests green; docs/tour/05-knowledge-base.md demo script works
features.evidence: 2026-06-10: ./init.sh → pint passed, phpstan 0 errors, pest 194/194 (830 assertions). php artisan test --compact --filter=KnowledgeBase → 49 passed (117 assertions: AdminCrud 26, PortalBrowsing 16, Search 7). migrate:fresh --seed → 2 books, 3 chapters, 10 pages (7 published). Review cycle 1 of 3 PASS (0 critical/high; 1 medium + 1 low fixed in-cycle). Demo script steps covered by tests: permission 403 + hidden nav, publish matrix, scoped-slug cross-resolution 404, <script> escaping, search wildcard escaping, slug regen 404.

features.name: Automation Rules
features.description: RuleEngine + Mail Rules (inbound pipeline), Triggers (domain events), scheduled Automation Rules (automation:run + scheduler), rule builder UI. Spec: docs/ideation/helpstripe/spec-phase-6.md
features.done_when: ./init.sh passes; Automation tests green incl. loop guard; all three seeded rule layers fire per docs/tour/06-automation.md demo script

features.name: Collision Detection
features.description: Laravel Reverb + Echo presence channels on request detail: viewer banner + live timeline updates. Spec: docs/ideation/helpstripe/spec-phase-7.md
features.done_when: ./init.sh passes; Collision tests green; two-browser presence demo works per docs/tour/07-collision-detection.md
features.evidence: 2026-06-10: ./init.sh → composer install OK; pint passed; phpstan 0 errors; pest 240/240 (944 assertions). php artisan test --compact --filter=Collision → 13 passed (ChannelAuth 3, Broadcast 4, ViewerState 5 + shared helper). install:broadcasting --reverb wired config/{broadcasting,reverb}.php + channels: routing + echo.js scaffold; laravel-echo/pusher-js via bun; bun run build bundles Echo (app.js 0B→73KB). routes/channels.php request.{id} presence channel (auth mirrors RequestPolicy::view). NoteAdded implements ShouldBroadcast (PresenceChannel, broadcastWith=note_id only); AddNote dispatches via broadcast()->toOthers() (listener still fires, verified by Inbox suite). ⚡show getListeners() here/joining/leaving→$viewers (dedupe by id, self-excluded) + NoteAdded→refreshTimeline; viewers.blade.php banner partial. Review cycle 1 of 3 PASS (0 critical/high). Two-browser live demo is the manual matrix in docs/tour/07-collision-detection.md §7; Pest covers auth matrix + broadcast contract + viewer-state rules offline.

features.name: Reporting
features.description: Reports page: stat cards, requests-over-time Flux chart, category SLA table, agent performance table, shared scopeSlaBreached. Spec: docs/ideation/helpstripe/spec-phase-8.md
features.done_when: ./init.sh passes; Reports tests green with exact expected aggregates; docs/tour/08-reporting.md demo script works against seeded data
